creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:

which is coming from

        curkthr = kgdb_thr_lookup_tid(dumptid);
        if (curkthr == NULL)
                curkthr = first;

gdb$ p dumptid
$20 = 0x0

which is coming from

        TRY {
                dumptid = parse_and_eval_long("dumptid");
        } CATCH(e, RETURN_MASK_ERROR) {
                dumptid = -1;
        } END_CATCH
